zh.lifeSummary: 當Bishop Orscand de Vannes II於0930年出生在法國布列塔尼莫比韓瓦斯時，他的父親Roudalt de Bretagne51歲，母親Madam Rudalt Vannes51歲。他和Guénedon De Vannes至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於從0990年7月29日到0992年6月27日。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vannes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ferns
meanings: English: variant of Fern with plural or excrescent -s.
Irish: variant of Fearn 3, with excrescent -s. Compare Renehan .

en.lifeSummary: When Bishop Orscand de Vannes II was born in 0930, in Vannes, Morbihan, Brittany, France, his father, Roudalt de Bretagne, was 51 and his mother, Madam Rudalt Vannes, was 51. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Guénedon De Vannes. He died from 29 July 0990 to 27 June 0992.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bishop Orscand de Vannes II est né en 0930, à Vannes, Morbihan, Bretagne, France, son père, Roudalt de Bretagne, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Madam Rudalt Vannes, avait 51 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Guénedon De Vannes. Il est décédé du 29 juillet 0990 au 27 juin 0992.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bishop Orscand de Vannes II 0930 in Vannes, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roudalt de Bretagne 51 und seine Mutter Madam Rudalt Vannes 51. Er hatte mit Guénedon De Vannes mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb von 29. Juli 0990 bis 27. Juni 0992.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bishop Orscand de Vannes II è nato il nel 0930 nel Vannes, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Roudalt de Bretagne, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Madam Rudalt Vannes, aveva 51 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Guénedon De Vannes. Morì da 29 luglio 0990 a 27 giugno 0992.

ja.lifeSummary: Bishop Orscand de Vannes IIが0930年にフランスブレタグンモービハンヴァンスで生まれた時，父Roudalt de Bretagneは51歳，母Madam Rudalt Vannesは51歳であった。彼はGuénedon De Vannesとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼はから0990年7月29日まで0992年6月27日に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bishop Orscand de Vannes II(이)가 0930년 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 버네스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roudalt de Bretagne(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Madam Rudalt Vannes(은)는 51세였다. 그는 Guénedon De Vannes(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 0990년 7월 29일부터 0992년 6월 27일까지 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bishop Orscand de Vannes II nasceu em 0930, em Vannes, Morbihan, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Roudalt de Bretagne, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Madam Rudalt Vannes, tinha 51 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Guénedon De Vannes. Ele faleceu de 29 de julho de 0990 a 27 de junho de 0992.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bishop Orscand de Vannes II родился в 0930 г. в местности ваннесь, морбихань, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Roudalt de Bretagne было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Madam Rudalt Vannes, 51. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Guénedon De Vannes. Он умер с 29 июля 0990 по 27 июня 0992.
